author: claude
content: Socket-reliability Phase 1 done: bidi finalize-ack work stacked on hardened sockets (#1180) as feat/bidi-on-hardening -> draft PR #1196. #1174's framing-safe ClientSocket.receive() is the canonical read path; #1129's data-socket back-channel (StorageController finalize_ack reply + DataSocket.finalize_visit_id_with_ack) landed as wired-but-uncalled infra for Phase 3 R1 to consume. #1129's TaskManager wiring was DROPPED + flagged needs-human: it assumed the abandoned refactor/event-driven-completion finalize path; on master finalize is FinalizeCommand->extension, not TaskManager. Phase 3 R1 must pick the call site.
